introduction: We enter the (digital) space of Kita’s World. An avatar developed by Martine Syms and featured in a series of her works. In Meditation we have a representation of how effective that ritual can be for a temporal, spacial, inner but also outer focus. A gesture that provokes a more satient state, which leads to more — and much needed — power and strength. We let our minds be present, be open, our bodies respond. We recollect and let it all (whatever we need) sink (deeply) in.
